---
title: "Geophysical Fluid Dynamics and Atmospheric Modeling"
subtitle: "PHYS-002 | Track F — Physical Systems"
description: "The dynamics of rotating, stratified fluids on planetary scales: the mathematical foundation for weather prediction, ocean modeling, and climate science."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Geophysical Fluid Dynamics and Atmospheric Modeling

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
